settings.editor:
Product Description


Step into elegance with this beautifully crafted Anarkali suit set. The gown boasts a dramatic flare and premium inner lining for maximum comfort during long events. Complete with a matching pant and an embroidered shawl-style dupatta, this outfit is designed to make a statement at weddings and festive gatherings.

Top (Anarkali)


Neck & Sleeves: Neck: V Neck || Sleeve Length – Full Sleeves || Sleeve Style – Rollup

Design & Pattern: Heavy pure blooming Vichitra silk fabric tailored into a striking full-kali pattern with an impressive 3.50 to 3.80-meter volume flare.

Intricate Embellishments: Detailed with fancy yoke lace work, paired with full churidar sleeves featuring exquisite embroidery dori, zari, and sequence lace accents.

Premium Lining: Stitched with a pure micro-scrape full inner lining for maximum comfort.

Length: Anarkali length measures approximately 48 to 49 inches.

Bottom (Pant)


Fabric & Work: Made from matching premium pure blooming Vichitra silk, beautifully accented with fancy coordinating bottom lace work.

Fit: Free-size, fully stitched regular-fit trousers designed for effortless comfort.

Dupatta


Style & Dimensions: 2.2-meter shawl-type dupatta with a elegant 25-inch width, making it highly versatile for styling.

Artwork: Crafted from pure blooming Vichitra silk fabric embellished with detailed embroidery sequence, dori, and zari work.

Borders: Finished beautifully with a premium, fancy lace border layout along the edges.

Wash Instructions


First Wash: Dry clean recommended to maintain the fabric texture and sequence work.

Subsequent Washes: Gentle hand wash separately in cold water using a mild liquid detergent.

Care Advice: Do not wring or twist. Dry in shade away from direct sunlight to prevent color fading. Iron on low heat on the reverse side only.
